brand_lock: MyGenie existing brand — LOCKED 2026-06-09 (owner-confirmed). Logo: https://www.mygenie.online/asset/images/logo.svg (already live at /brand/logo.svg). Tagline: 'Streamlined Hospitality. Exceptional Experience.'
theme: Light theme (white + soft sand) with deep brand-green premium dark sections

headings.reason: Characterful display face paired with brand font; handles giant profit numbers.

body.reason: MyGenie's existing brand font — kept for continuity.

rules: Keep MyGenie green as the primary/CTA color; orange as secondary accent; yellow sparingly.
Deep brand-green (#0C2A1A) for premium dark sections (Before/After, AI band).
Numbers/metrics (25%, ₹1 Lakh, 40%) are hero visual elements — massive, in green or orange.
Headings in Clash Display, body in Poppins. Never Inter/Roboto.
Asymmetric bento grids; pill buttons; lucide-react icons; never emoji.
Every interactive/info element gets a kebab-case data-testid.
